translations:
I
			went down and burned incense

Infectum.turoyo: hawi čāx d-u=šəmloyo, aš=šamoše lə=naḥiti d-mšamlən
translations:
when
			it was time for burning of incense, deacons did not go down to
			burn incense

Participle_Active.turoyo: ḥa mənne k-owe mšamlono, w a=ḥrene k-əmmi qole 790; 94/37, 38;
translations:
einer
			von ihnen schwingt das Rauchfass, die anderen singen geistliche
			Gesänge

Infinitive.turoyo: hawi čāx d-u=šəmloyo, aš=šamoše lə=naḥiti də-mšamlən 789-790; 40/4;
translations:
when
			it was time for burning of incense, deacons did not go down to
			burn incense
